name: First Coast Mortgage Funding | Carson Home Team
description_short: First Coast Mortgage Funding is a Jacksonville-based mortgage lender offering home purchase and refinance loans through a team of licensed loan officers including Eric Carson.
description_long:
First Coast Mortgage Funding operates as a mortgage lender based in Jacksonville, Florida, with an office at 11363 San Jose Blvd, Building 200. The company holds NMLS license 1953441 and employs a team of approximately 40+ loan officers who service clients seeking mortgage solutions in the home purchase and refinance markets.

The company offers home purchase loans for new homebuyers and refinance options for existing homeowners. They provide access to multiple loan programs and maintain resources including a mortgage calculator, loan process information, FAQ section, and educational content on mortgage basics. Their stated service model emphasizes personalized solutions tailored to individual financial situations, with particular attention to first-time homebuyers, servicemembers, and families undergoing relocation.

First Coast Mortgage Funding distinguishes itself through a team-based approach, featuring loan officers like Eric Carson who emphasize precision, responsiveness, and clear communication throughout the mortgage process. The company maintains extended business hours (Monday-Friday 8:30 AM to 7:30 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM) and claims 24/7 support availability. Their website highlights customer reviews and includes resources designed to educate borrowers about loan options and the homeownership process.

As a mortgage lender, First Coast Mortgage Funding serves a standard market role in residential financing. The company provides no information regarding specific interest rates, loan terms, approval timelines, or competitive differentiation beyond service claims. No independent third-party ratings, certifications, or customer review data are provided on their website. Borrowers should conduct independent rate shopping and verification of licensing before proceeding.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended office hours including Saturday service (9 AM to 6 PM) provide accessibility beyond standard business hours
Team of 40+ loan officers allows borrowers to select a specific loan officer match
Educational resources on-site including mortgage calculator, loan process guide, and mortgage basics
Stated specialization in servicemember and military family lending, reflecting understanding of relocation needs
First-time homebuyer programs explicitly offered as a service category
Company NMLS license (1953441) publicly disclosed for regulatory verification
Support and sales team claimed to be available 24/7 for inquiries
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed on website; rate comparison impossible
No third-party reviews, ratings, or independent verification of service quality provided
No information on approval timelines, processing speed, or loan decision timeframes
Limited detail on specific loan programs offered; only generic categories mentioned
No transparency regarding credit score requirements, loan amount ranges, or lending criteria
best_for: First-time homebuyers in the Jacksonville, Florida area seeking personalized guidance
Servicemembers and military families relocating or purchasing homes
Homeowners seeking refinance options with extended availability hours
diagnosis: First Coast Mortgage Funding is a standard residential mortgage lender suitable for Jacksonville-area borrowers seeking home purchase or refinance options with personalized service. The primary caveat is lack of rate transparency and independent verification—borrowers must contact directly for quotes and should verify licensing and compare offers with other lenders before committing.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 11363 San Jose Blvd Building 200, Jacksonville, FL 32223
